title: Mysterious Flashes in 1950s Skies Linked to Nuclear Tests and UAP Sightings: Study
description: A new statistical analysis of archival sky surveys from the early Cold War has found that mysterious, short-lived bursts of light in the night sky were more likely to appear around the time of above-ground nuclear weapons tests and to increase alongside reports of unexplained aerial phenomena (UAPs).

title: Kacey Musgraves details ‘craziest f—ing’ UFO experience
description: Three glowing orbs allegedly followed Grammy winner's flight from Texas to Nashville

title: Kacey Musgraves Details "Crazy F--king" Alleged UFO Sighting on Flight

title: David Duchovny on Ryan Coogler’s ‘The X-Files’ Reboot, and Why He Doubts UFO Stories
description: The actor on whether he'll appear in Ryan Coogler's revival of his Fox hit (maybe?), the UFO/UAP phenomena, and season two of History's 'Secrets Declassified.'
